response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-native platform design as required; most recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang with minimal evidence of multi-threaded, low-latency C++ systems or industrial IoT protocols.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to build high-performance, event-driven systems
concerns: No visible C++ experience in last 9+ years; last C++ role was in 2015
Lacks documented experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No evidence of message brokers, MQTT, REST APIs in industrial context or cloud platforms like Azure
